name: Earnings Reviewer
strengths: Surprise 表 + segment read + takeaway + model 调整 — 卖方 morning note 完整体例
PT bump + rating 给到具体数字
DC / Networking / Margin 三条线索清晰
weaknesses: Conference call 关键引述未引入
Real-data anchor 已加，深度数据集成（earnings transcript、年报 XBRL）仍需进一步对接
verdict: Wall Street earnings note 最佳实践的复刻；接 SEC API 后可达到 publishable 水平。
best_for: Sell-side first-take note, buy-side 速读, IR 内部对照
